comments.author: @Lando240
comments.text:
Javanese, like those volcanoes, is everchanging. 
From Animism Society, to Hindu-Buddha Kingdoms, then came Islamic Sultanates, endured Centuries of Colonialism, and now part of Republic of Indonesia. The people is just as magnificent as the land they are living on.

comments.author: @johnweimer3249
comments.text: My house in New Jersey is up for sale. It’s empty and as soon as it sells, I will go back to my new home in Yogyakarta with my incredible Indonesian wife. The country is absolutely gorgeous, and it’s the land of incredible smiles of wonderful people. The volcanoes don’t scare me at all, actually they’re pretty cool. And I know someplace out there dinosaurs still roam 😁 I can’t wait to start the second chapter of my life in this amazing and fascinating country.
